titleStmt.title: SII 9.57: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 57. (A.R. No. 271 of 1918.) ON A HERO-STONE SET UP IN A FIELD TO THE WEST OF THE VILLAGE KADABAGERE, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 844, Chitrabhānu, Bhādrapada, puṇṇame, Tuesday, in the reign of the Rāshṭrakūṭa king Nityavarsha Indra-Ballaha (III). The Mahāsāmanta Bijja is said to be ruling over Kōgaḷi five-hundred and Māsiyavāḍi hundred-and-forty. A certain Māḷayya, son of Kaṇṇavāra Mududaradēvayya of the Kadamba dynasty is said to have fought with Aṇṇiga, son of Ayyapa of Noḻambavāḍi, at Paḍugallu and died victorious. The date corresponds probably to A.D. 922 September 9, Monday; the week day is wrong.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . nityavarṣadēva śrīpṛthuvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja pa
ramēsvara paramabhaṭṭāraka pravardhamāna vijayaśrīindarabhallaharā
jya Uttarōttara Abhivirddhige saluttire sakanripakālātītasaṁvatsaraśata
ṅgaḷeṇṭunūṟa nālvattanālkaneya citrabhānuvemba sambatsara
pravartise . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmanta biru
daraṟoṭṭa birudaramaikutti śrīmat bijja kōgaḻiyeynūṟu
māsiyavāḍi nūṟanālvattunāḷuttire svasti samastabhuvanabhāskaracaraṇāravindayugaḷa banavāsipuraparamēsvara mṛgēndralāñchanam vānaradhvaja Asvamēdhāva santarpita caturāśītinakarādhiṣṭita nātha nagarakke bhīma baddekandarpa bhṛtyacintāmaṇi nannimārtaṇḍa kadaṁbavaṁśōdbhava śrīmat kaṇnavāra
mududaradēvayyana magaṁ māḷayya kuḍiyarayarjuna kāyvaraḻdaridi paradāsi noḻambavāḍiyoḷayyapadēvana maganaṇnigan pari śrāvaṇa śuddha bhādrapadamāsada bahuḷa (?) puṇnimeyumaṅgaravāradandu paḍugalla kādutire barkkammigeṟeyoḷiḻdu māḷayya paridu kādi geldu svargatanādam © janekkalkeṟevāḍiya gāvuṇḍa .
Digital edition of SII 9.57 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
